method: compare 4 incomplete stores against 5-store BARE-NAME sample (AMM/AFT/AYEVO/UPTC/AYSOL); identify ONLY the groups directly required by S238 to keep within the v1.1 plan's ALLOWED_ACCOUNT_NAMES = {Stock Assets, Accounts Payable, Current Assets} and HB-1 (max 4 groups per store)

sample_canonical_chain_observed.Stock Assets: Stock Assets - <ABBR> -> Current Assets - <ABBR> -> Application of Funds (Assets) - <ABBR>
sample_canonical_chain_observed.Accounts Payable: Accounts Payable - <ABBR> -> Current Liabilities - <ABBR> -> Source of Funds (Liabilities) - <ABBR>

deviation_from_canonical: Asset side: parent Current Assets to target store's existing '1100000 - ASSETS - <ABBR>' instead of canonical 'Application of Funds (Assets) - <ABBR>' — saves creating 1 extra group per store. Liability side: parent Accounts Payable to NULL (top-level, sibling to existing 2104000 - INTERCOMPANY PAYABLES - <ABBR>) instead of canonical 'Accounts Payable -> Current Liabilities -> Source of Funds (Liabilities)' — saves creating 2 extra groups per store. S238's _find_parent_group_for queries by account_name (BARE), not by parent chain — so the deviation does NOT break S238's lookup. Closeout SUMMARY records the canonical-root mismatch as follow-up sprint candidate (alongside B8 verifier extension).

groups_to_create.rationale: S238 Phase 1-T1 needs this parent for Input VAT - BKI Inter-Co leaf. account_name BARE per BARE-NAME convention. Reuses target-store's existing Asset root.
S238 Phase 1-T1 needs this parent for Inventory-from-Commissary leaf. account_name BARE; chains under new Current Assets per canonical pattern.

S238 Phase 1-T1 needs this parent for AP-Trade-BKI leaf. Top-level Liability group (parent=NULL); sibling to existing 2104000 - INTERCOMPANY PAYABLES - ROA. Deviates from canonical AP -> Current Liabilities -> Source of Funds chain (would exceed 4-group limit) but S238 lookup unaffected.
S238 Phase 1-T1 needs this parent for Input VAT - BKI Inter-Co leaf.
S238 Phase 1-T1 needs this parent for Inventory-from-Commissary leaf.
S238 Phase 1-T1 needs this parent for AP-Trade-BKI leaf. Top-level Liability group.
S238 Phase 1-T1 needs this parent for Input VAT - BKI Inter-Co leaf.
S238 Phase 1-T1 needs this parent for Inventory-from-Commissary leaf.
S238 Phase 1-T1 needs this parent for AP-Trade-BKI leaf. Top-level Liability group.
S238 Phase 1-T1 needs this parent for Input VAT - BKI Inter-Co leaf.
S238 Phase 1-T1 needs this parent for Inventory-from-Commissary leaf.
S238 Phase 1-T1 needs this parent for AP-Trade-BKI leaf. Top-level Liability group.

hb_check.HB3_AP_parent_resolvable: PASS (parent_account=NULL is valid; top-level Liability group; sibling to existing target-store IC PAYABLES which is also top-level)
hb_check.HB4_no_docname_collision_with_existing: PASS (target stores' existing groups use number-prefix naming; new BARE-NAME docnames cannot collide)
